# @hap-fluent/docs

> Documentation site for hap-fluent

## Optional

### Types

- `AccessoryFlags`: Accessory capability flags (requires additional setup, etc.)
- `Active`: Active/inactive state for accessories
- `AirParticulateSize`: Particulate matter size categories for air quality sensors
- `AirQuality`: Air quality levels from excellent to poor
- `CameraOperatingModeIndicator`: Camera operating mode indicator enable/disable state
- `CarbonDioxideDetected`: Carbon dioxide detection state (normal or abnormal CO2 levels)
- `CarbonMonoxideDetected`: Carbon monoxide detection state (normal or abnormal CO levels)
- `ChargingState`: Battery charging states (not charging, charging, not chargeable)
- `ClosedCaptions`: Closed captions enabled or disabled state
- `ContactSensorState`: Contact sensor state (contact detected or not detected)
- `CurrentAirPurifierState`: Current operational state of an air purifier
- `CurrentDoorState`: Door position states (open, closed, opening, closing, stopped)
- `CurrentFanState`: Current operational state of a fan
- `CurrentHeaterCoolerState`: Current operational state of a heater/cooler (inactive, idle, heating, cooling)
- `CurrentHeatingCoolingState`: Current heating/cooling mode of a thermostat (off, heat, cool)
- `CurrentHumidifierDehumidifierState`: Current operational state of a humidifier/dehumidifier
- `CurrentMediaState`: Current playback state of a media device
- `CurrentSlatState`: Current position state of a slat (fixed, jammed, or swinging)
- `CurrentVisibilityState`: Current visibility state of a target (shown or hidden)
- `EventSnapshotsActive`: Event snapshots active state (disable or enable)
- `FilterChangeIndication`: Filter replacement indication state (OK or change required)
- `HomeKitCameraActive`: HomeKit camera active state (off or on)
- `InputDeviceType`: Input device type categories for TV accessories
- `InputSourceType`: Input source type categories (HDMI, tuner, Airplay, USB, etc.)
- `InUse`: Resource in-use state (not in use or in use)
- `IsConfigured`: Configuration state of an accessory or service (configured or not)
- `LeakDetected`: Water leak detection state (leak detected or not detected)
- `LockCurrentState`: Current lock mechanism state (unsecured, secured, jammed, unknown)
- `LockLastKnownAction`: Last known action that changed the lock state (physical, keypad, remote, etc.)
- `LockPhysicalControls`: Physical control lock state (control lock enabled or disabled)
- `LockTargetState`: Target lock state (unsecured or secured)
- `ManagedNetworkEnable`: Managed network enable state (disabled or enabled)
- `ManuallyDisabled`: Manually disabled state (note: 0=enabled, 1=disabled)
- `OccupancyDetected`: Occupancy sensor detection state (occupancy detected or not detected)
- `PeriodicSnapshotsActive`: Periodic snapshots active state (disable or enable)
- `PictureMode`: Display picture mode presets (standard, vivid, game, calibrated, etc.)
- `PositionState`: Movement direction and state of a motorized position accessory
- `PowerModeSelection`: Power mode selection for TV-like accessories (show or hide)
- `ProgrammableSwitchEvent`: Programmable switch event types (single press, double press, long press)
- `ProgramMode`: Irrigation program scheduling modes (none, scheduled, manual override)
- `RecordingAudioActive`: Recording audio active state (disable or enable)
- `RemoteKey`: Remote control key commands for TV/media accessories
- `RotationDirection`: Fan or motor rotation direction (clockwise or counter-clockwise)
- `RouterStatus`: Router operational readiness state (ready or not ready)
- `SecuritySystemAlarmType`: Security system alarm type (no alarm or unknown alarm type)
- `SecuritySystemCurrentState`: Current security system arm state (stay, away, night, disarmed, or triggered)
- `SecuritySystemTargetState`: Target security system arm state (stay, away, night, or disarm)
- `ServiceLabelNamespace`: Labeling namespace for service label indices (dots or arabic numerals)
- `SiriInputType`: Siri input trigger type for Siri-enabled accessories
- `SlatType`: Slat orientation type (horizontal or vertical)
- `SleepDiscoveryMode`: Accessory sleep discovery mode (not discoverable or always discoverable)
- `SmokeDetected`: Smoke detection state (smoke detected or not detected)
- `StatusFault`: Accessory fault status (no fault or general fault)
- `StatusJammed`: Jam status of a motorized accessory (not jammed or jammed)
- `StatusLowBattery`: Battery level status (normal or low battery)
- `StatusTampered`: Tamper detection status of an accessory (not tampered or tampered)
- `SwingMode`: Fan or air vent swing mode (swing disabled or enabled)
- `TargetAirPurifierState`: Target operating mode for an air purifier (manual or auto)
- `TargetDoorState`: Target door state to achieve (open or closed)
- `TargetFanState`: Target fan operating mode (manual or auto)
- `TargetHeaterCoolerState`: Target heater/cooler mode (auto, heat, or cool)
- `TargetHeatingCoolingState`: Target thermostat heating/cooling mode (off, heat, cool, or auto)
- `TargetHumidifierDehumidifierState`: Target humidifier/dehumidifier operating mode
- `TargetMediaState`: Target playback state for a media device (play, pause, or stop)
- `TargetVisibilityState`: Target visibility state to achieve (shown or hidden)
- `TemperatureDisplayUnits`: Temperature display unit preference (Celsius or Fahrenheit)
- `ThirdPartyCameraActive`: Third-party camera active state (off or on)
- `ValveType`: Valve type categories (generic, irrigation, shower head, water faucet)
- `VolumeControlType`: Volume control type supported by a speaker (none, relative, relative with current, absolute)
- `VolumeSelector`: Volume adjustment direction (increment or decrement)
- `WiFiSatelliteStatus`: Wi-Fi satellite node connection status (unknown, connected, not connected)
